name: Marco, Polo and Mina - The Uncool Kids
description:
This is unironically the best bot I've ever made imo, and I made it several months ago and never bothered making it public until now. 😭

Anyway, summer shenanigans with the besties! What kinds of nonsense will you get up to? 👀

(I totally didn't base this off of Phineas and Ferb lmao)
creator: Agent O
